cards.title: Business Risks
cards.content:
• Marine Cargo (Open Policy)
• Employees' Compensation Act
• Public Liability Act, 1991 (Hazardous Substances)
• Professional Indemnity (Negligence Cover)

cards.title: Marine Open Policy
cards.content: Continuous cover for all shipments over a year. No need for separate policies for each dispatch.

cards.title: CAR vs EAR
cards.content:
CAR (Contractor's All Risk): For civil works (Bridges, Dams).
EAR (Erection All Risk): For machinery installation/testing.

cards.title: Public Liability Act, 1991
cards.content: CRITICAL: Absolutely COMPULSORY for businesses handling 'hazardous substances' (e.g., Chemical factories).

cards.title: Employees' Compensation
cards.content: Liability to pay for injuries/death 'out of and in course of employment'.

cards.title: Professional Negligence
cards.content: Protects Doctors, Lawyers, and Architects from client claims for errors or omissions.

sections.title: 🚀 Exam Pro-Tips (Repeated Themes)
items: Hazardous chemicals policy: Public Liability Insurance.
Negligence cover for doctors: Professional Indemnity.
Employer's legal liability: Employees' Compensation Policy.

cards.title: Q2. Mandatory Act for chemical factories?
